sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check player position after LEFT
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

player = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'b'][0]
target = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'Y'][0]

print(f"Player boundary: {player['boundary']}")
print(f"Target boundary: {target['boundary']}")

# Check adjacency
adj = seg['adjacency_list']
player_adj = [pair for pair in adj if player['id'] in pair]
print(f"Player adjacent to: {[(nodes[pair[0] if pair[1]==player['id'] else pair[1]]['color'], nodes[pair[0] if pair[1]==player['id'] else pair[1]]['id']) for pair in player_adj]}")

# Look at the area around the player
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nAround player:")
for r in range(35, 43):
    print(f"Row {r}: {ascii_lines[r][18:28]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
